citations.transliteration: Khamsun mina'd-dawabbi kulluhunna fasiqun yuqtalna fi'l-harami: al-ghurabu wa'l-hida'atu wa'l-aqrabu wa'l-fa'ratu wa'l-kalbu'l-aqur.
citations.translation_en: Five animals are fāsiq (harmful) and may be killed even in the Haram: the crow, the kite, the scorpion, the rat, and the biting dog.

citations.transliteration: Khamsun fawasiqu yuqtalna fi'l-hilli wa'l-harami: al-hayyatu wa'l-ghurabu'l-abqa'u wa'l-fa'ratu wa'l-kalbu'l-aquru wa'l-hudayya.
citations.translation_en: Five are fāsiq and should be killed in the sacred and non-sacred: the snake, the piebald crow, the rat, the biting dog, and the kite.

citations.transliteration: Iqtulu al-hayyati waqtulu dha't-tufyatayni wa'l-abtara fa-innahuma yatmisani al-basara wa-yusqitani al-habal.
citations.translation_en: Kill the snakes; and kill the two-striped snake and the short-tailed snake, for they cause blindness and miscarriage.

citations.transliteration: Anna nabiyyan mina'l-anbiya'i qarasat-hu namlatun fa-amara bi-qaryati'n-namli fa-uhriqat fa-awhallahu ilayhi: An qarasat-ka namlatun ahraqta ummatan mina'l-umami tusabbih.
citations.translation_en: A prophet was stung by an ant and ordered the ant colony to be burned. Allah revealed to him: A single ant stung you and you burned an entire community that glorified Allah.

citations.transliteration: Man qatala wazaghatan fi awwali darbatun kutibat lahu mi'atu hasanatin wa fi't-thaniyate duna dhalika wa fi't-thali-thate duna dhalika.
citations.translation_en: Whoever kills a gecko in the first strike, 100 good deeds are recorded for him; in the second strike, fewer than that; and in the third strike, fewer than that.

citations.transliteration: Naha rasulullahi sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallama 'an qatli arba'in mina'd-dawabbi: al-namlatu wa'l-nahlatu wa'l-hudhudu wa'l-surad.
citations.translation_en: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the killing of four creatures: the ant, the bee, the hoopoe, and the shrike.

citations.transliteration: Naha rasulullahi sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallama 'an qatli al-difda'i.
citations.translation_en: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade the killing of frogs.
